title: Trane Technologies Recertified by Great Place to Work®
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #GPTWCertified--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, has been Certified™ by Great Place to Work® for the second year in a row. The recertification recognizes employers who create an outstanding employee experience and is based entirely on feedback from current Trane Technologies employees. “At Trane Technologies, we strive to create a working environment where our employees are proud to work for our company, energized by their work and optimistic about the

title: Trane Technologies Announces Sponsorship of the Science Museum of Minnesota's KAYSC STEM Freedom School
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #STEM--Global climate innovator Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) has provided the Science Museum of Minnesota with over $280,000 to support the Kitty Andersen Youth Science Center (KAYSC) STEM Freedom School. The donation will complete the funding needed for the KAYSC's summer program combining the Science Museum's innovative approach to STEM education and workforce development with the highly effective Children's Defense Fund (CDF) Freedom School model. text: V4SV is a stunning homage to Norton’s 100-year racing prowess and success at the Isle of Man TT – imagined on the track, born on the road...

title: Reasons to Retain Trane Technologies' (TT) Stock For Now
text: Trane Technologies (TT) has a consistent record of rewarding its shareholders through dividend payments and share repurchases.

title: Trane Technologies Reports Results of Voting from 2022 Annual General Meeting, Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, held its 2022 Annual General Meeting of shareholders in Adare, Ireland.
